# Lines to exclude from codespell checking
# These are intentional spellings in specific contexts

# CHANGELOG: documenting a bug fix about misspelling
- "Retrieve" is sometimes misspelled "retrive" ([#8595](https://github.com/openemr/openemr/issues/8595))

# Company name in copyright notice (Wrapp was a Swedish mobile commerce company)
 * (c) 2013-2016 Nicklas Ansman, 2013 Wrapp

# Layout-field snapshot fixture renders the literal "WIT" option_id from
# the relationship-types list (short for "Witness"). The fixture is
# auto-generated by composer update-layout-field-fixtures; it captures
# renderer output verbatim and must not be edited by hand.
<option value="WIT" >Witness</option>
